text:
is an artbook that collects all the original artwork created for the Evangelion Chronicle encyclopedia series, plus new pieces produced exclusively for this volume. It was originally published in 2008 by We've and the 2011 Edition by Village Books. An English version was published on 25 December 2012 by Udon Entertainment (First Edition). 

Overview

Collection of Illustrations collected from the first 30 issues of Evangelion Chronicle. The Revised Edition released in 2011, also collects material from the new issues of Evangelion chronicle focused in the first two films of the Rebuild of Evangelion film series.

Information

Author:Evangelion Chronicle Editorial Staff
Illustration: Youichi Fukano, Naochika Morishita, K2 Shoukai, Kaito Otomo, Yoshio Sugiura, Shishizaru, Shuji Imai, Takayuki Yanase, Kmyu, Yoshihiro Takahashi, Hirofumi Ichikawa, Takuya Io, Tomotake Kinoshita, Kakoi Kazuhiko, Toshihiro Ono. This list only covers the 2008 Edition 
Publisher: We've, Village Books.
Language: Japanese
Number of pages: 135 pages
Dimensions: 24 x 30 cm
Release date: 2008, 2011
ISBN-10: ISBN 4789770281 (2008) ISBN 4863323646 (2011)
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4863323643 (2008) ISBN 978-4863323643 (2011)

References

 

 

fr:Evangelion Chronicle: Illustrations
